title: chrysocoma ovata
intro: Chrysocoma ovata, also known as the Golden Bells plant, is a South African shrub that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chrysocoma ovata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. Chrysocoma ovata is often prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine as a topical application for wound healing and skin conditions.
